predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second (deceased) person.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_ascendants
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves relatives in the ascending line.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_close_collaterals
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: asset_is_common_property
predicates.description: The asset forms part of the common matrimonial property of the deceased person.

predicates.name: asset_is_exclusive_undivided_between_spouses
predicates.description: The asset is exclusively held in undivided co-ownership between the spouses of the deceased.

predicates.name: asset_is_own_property_of_deceased
predicates.description: The asset belongs to the own (separate) estate of the deceased person.

predicates.name: asset_subject_to_legal_reversion_art424
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal reversion as referred to in article 4.24 for the deceased person.

predicates.name: asset_subject_to_legal_reversion_art425
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal reversion as referred to in article 4.25 for the deceased person.

predicates.name: deed_of_gift_excludes_usufruct
predicates.description: The deed of gift for the asset stipulates otherwise than the default usufruct for the surviving spouse of the deceased.

predicates.name: testament_excludes_usufruct
predicates.description: The testament stipulates otherwise than the default usufruct on the reversion asset for the surviving spouse of the deceased.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_ascendants_or_close_collaterals
predicates.description: The deceased leaves relatives in the ascending line or close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: asset_is_common_or_exclusive_undivided
predicates.description: The asset is part of the common matrimonial property or exclusively undivided between the spouses of the deceased.

predicates.name: asset_subject_to_legal_reversion
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal reversion under article 4.24 or 4.25 for the deceased.

predicates.name: reversion_usufruct_excluded_by_instrument
predicates.description: The deed of gift or testament stipulates otherwise than the default usufruct on the reversion asset for the surviving spouse.

predicates.name: acquires_full_ownership_of_asset
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires full ownership of the asset as a legal consequence of succession.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_asset
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires usufruct over the asset as a legal consequence of succession.
